name: fan-perks-skills
description: Fan Perks TKCPS Open API skills for rebate agents.

interface.shortDescription: Call Fan Perks deal, order, account, and withdraw APIs.
interface.longDescription: Install Fan Perks agent skills for TKCPS Open API workflows, including product deal search, rebate link conversion, member order lookup, account summaries, withdraw configuration, withdraw applications, and withdraw records.
defaultPrompt: Use Fan Perks to search deals and convert rebate links.
Check my Fan Perks orders and commission summary.
Review withdraw limits before submitting an application.
